test_cases.name: health_check_ok
test_cases.description: Health check endpoint returns 200 OK.

test_cases.name: create_author_success
test_cases.description: Successfully create a new author with valid data.

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_name
test_cases.description: Attempt to create author with missing required name field.

test_cases.name: get_author_success
test_cases.description: Retrieve an existing author by ID.

test_cases.name: get_author_not_found
test_cases.description: Attempt to retrieve a non-existent author.

test_cases.name: delete_author_without_books
test_cases.description: Delete an author who has no associated books.

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_books_conflict
test_cases.description: Attempt to delete an author who has associated books.

test_cases.name: create_book_success
test_cases.description: Successfully create a new book with valid data.

test_cases.name: create_book_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Attempt to create a book with a duplicate ISBN.

test_cases.name: get_book_success
test_cases.description: Retrieve an existing, non-deleted book by ID.

test_cases.name: get_book_soft_deleted
test_cases.description: Attempt to retrieve a soft-deleted book.

test_cases.name: soft_delete_book_success
test_cases.description: Perform a soft delete on an existing book.

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Restore a previously soft-deleted book.

test_cases.name: restore_not_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Attempt to restore a book that is not deleted.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_old_book
test_cases.description: Apply a valid discount to a book published more than 1 year ago.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_new_book
test_cases.description: Attempt to apply a discount to a book published less than 1 year ago.

test_cases.name: increase_stock_success
test_cases.description: Increase the stock quantity of a book.

test_cases.name: decrease_stock_below_zero
test_cases.description: Attempt to decrease stock below zero.

test_cases.name: upload_valid_cover
test_cases.description: Upload a valid JPEG/PNG cover image under 2 MB.

test_cases.name: upload_cover_file_too_large
test_cases.description: Attempt to upload a cover image larger than 2 MB.

test_cases.name: create_review_success
test_cases.description: Add a valid review to a book.

test_cases.name: create_tag_success
test_cases.description: Create a new tag with a unique name.

test_cases.name: create_tag_duplicate_name
test_cases.description: Attempt to create a tag with a duplicate name.

test_cases.name: add_tags_to_book
test_cases.description: Add multiple tags to a book.

test_cases.name: create_order_success
test_cases.description: Create a new order with sufficient stock.

test_cases.name: create_order_insufficient_stock
test_cases.description: Attempt to create an order for a book with insufficient stock.

test_cases.name: update_order_status_valid_transition
test_cases.description: Update order status through a valid state transition (pending -> confirmed).

test_cases.name: update_order_status_invalid_transition
test_cases.description: Attempt an invalid status transition (pending -> delivered).

test_cases.name: get_invoice_for_confirmed_order
test_cases.description: Generate an invoice for an order in confirmed status.

test_cases.name: get_invoice_for_pending_order_forbidden
test_cases.description: Attempt to get an invoice for an order in pending status.
